item.title: Nancy Guthrie live updates: Male DNA lifted from glove found near Guthrie home
item.description: The search is intensifying for 84-year-old Nancy Guthrie, the mother of "Today" show host Savannah Guthrie.

item.title: WATCH: Former President Obama responds to President Trump’s racist video post
item.description: Barack Obama spoke out a week after President Trump's social media account posted a video depicting him and Michelle Obama as apes, condemning behavio...

item.title: WATCH: Golden retriever puppy perplexed by butterfly perched on its face
item.description: This adorable golden retriever puppy looked slightly perplexed as a butterfly perched on its forehead in Oceanside, California.

item.title: Rep. Massie says he doesn't have confidence in Bondi as attorney general
item.description: Republican Rep. Thomas Massie says he doesn't approve of how AG Pam Bondi conducted herself after Wednesday's clash over DOJ's Epstein files in House ...

item.title: WATCH: Popcorn machine catches fire during college basketball game
item.description: Play was briefly stopped during the first half of Saturday's game between the Oklahoma Sooners and Georgia Bulldogs after a popcorn machine caught fir...
